content:
In this post I’ll test several useful features of this blog. I’ll update it whenever I add other features.
Math Typesetting Mathematical notation can be enabled by using KaTeX. For exapmle: $$ \varphi = 1+\frac{1} {1+\frac{1} {1+\frac{1} {1+\cdots} } } $$ Note: Refer to Supported TeX Functions for more information.
Emoji It is now possible to add emoji into posts. For example: 😄
Note: Refer to Emoji Cheat Sheet for more information.
Code It’s easy to add code blocks with highlight in your posts by giving the specific programming language. For example:
1 2  # a simple python code example print("hello world")
summary:
In this post I’ll test several useful features of this blog. I’ll update it whenever I add other features.
Math Typesetting Mathematical notation can be enabled by using KaTeX. For exapmle: $$ \varphi = 1+\frac{1} {1+\frac{1} {1+\frac{1} {1+\cdots} } } $$ Note: Refer to Supported TeX Functions for more information.
Emoji It is now possible to add emoji into posts. For example: 😄
Note: Refer to Emoji Cheat Sheet for more information.
title: Blog Features Testing

content:
BUPT计算机本科在读。未来或许会从事DS和AI方向。
项目经历：
 校内：疫情数据分析、LNG站点聚类、推特情感分析、基于Kappa架构的大数据推荐系统等等 研究：对抗训练与对抗样本检测（清华）、多模态知识图谱（北邮）、借助NLP技术的助手软件开发（清华） 比赛：2022语言与智能技术竞赛：知识对话  关于此博客： 会记录两个内容：
 学习、阅读论文等笔记 日常随笔（同步更新在竹白）  抱歉最近很少更新自己的博客，未来我会把更多内容放在这里。
为什么要写博客：
 脑子不好使，需要经常记笔记，尤其配合Typora使用极其顺畅 写博客的过程就是在和自己对话，在此过程中对知识点的理解更深刻 方便和大家交流  联系方式 首页有邮箱、GitHub链接，建议使用邮箱联系。在我的GitHub页面中可以看到我的相关项目和比赛经历。
 I’m currently studying computer science at Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications. I would like to work on with data science and deep learning in the future.
Experience:
 In class: Covid-19 Data Analysis using Python, LNG Station Clustering, Twitter Self-Driving Car Sentiment Analysis, Big Data Recommendation System Based on Kappa, etc. Research: Adversarial Learning in THU, Multimodal Knowledge Graph in BUPT, Work Assistant APP Based on NLP Techniques in THU Competition: 2022 Language and Intelligence Technology Competition: Knowledge Dialogue  About this blog: What am I writing down:
 Notes for everyday study and valuable papers I’ve read Thoughts for daily life (I also upload this part on ZhuBai)  Why I created this blog:
 It’s amazing to write down all the notes in Markdown with Typora Writing a blog is kind of like talking to myself. I learn things better when I do this It’s also easier for me to talk with you guys and share our ideas  How to contact me: You can find my E-mail and GitHub page on the home page. It’s better if you contact me with E-mail since I check my email every day. Also you can find my projects and codes for several competitions on my GitHub :)
summary: BUPT计算机本科在读。未来或许会从事DS和AI方向。 项目经历： 校内：疫情数据分析、LNG站点聚类、推特情感分析、基于Kappa架构的大数据
title: About me :)
